description: A vulnerability, which was classified as critical, was found in code-projects Crime Reporting System 1.0. This affects an unknown part of the file /headlogin.php. The manipulation of the argument email leads to sql injection. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.
